title: The Honolulu J6CR & J2CR, According to 49 Reviewers
description: A synthesis of 49 reviews of the Honolulu J6CR and J2CR (CR 'Core Reactor' series) pickleball paddles. Consensus specs and price, points of genuine disagreement (durability, value), and a sponsorship-weighted read anchored on lab-tester Johnkew Pickleball.
